tabs: Settings > Leaves (Leave Policies, Leave Calendar, Leave Cycle)
Automations > Approval flows > Leave / Leave Salary Request / Leave Encashment

navigation_map_coverage.label: My Leaves (Employee View)
elements_found: Leave balance rings with available/used days

navigation_map_coverage.label: Approval Flows - Leave
actual_steps_used: Direct URL navigation to approval-flow page

primary_entity.name: Leave Policy
primary_entity.identified_from: Page header 'Leave Policies', table rows, create button 'Add new'

payload_triggers_used: Add new button at bottom of policies table
own_logic_used: Tested template selection modal with UAE/KSA tabs
create.notes: Create dialog offers Start from scratch or regional templates (UAE: 8, KSA: 10). Wizard has 4 steps: Setup > Add employees > Employee details > Review & save. Validation errors trigger on empty required fields (policy name, allowance).

payload_triggers_used: View (eye) icon on published policy rows
own_logic_used: Expanded all 6 accordion sections in policy summary
read.notes: View opens Leave Policy Summary page with 6 sections: Policy details, Leave allowance, Leave pay rate, Leave salary, Policy restrictions, Employees added.

own_logic_used: Tested edit on Draft policy (Test Sick)
update.notes: Edit opens same wizard as create but pre-populated. Both Draft and Published policies have Edit icon. Leave pay rate cannot be changed for active policies (WOF-007 confirmed).

delete.notes: Delete shows confirmation dialog with Cancel/Delete buttons. Only Draft policies have delete option visible.

triggers_found: Leave/Time Off triggers visible in workflow creation
actions_found: Leave-related actions available in workflow builder

signals_detected: Leave approval flow with Advanced + Default sections
Leave Salary Request approval flow tab
Default Leave flow: Step 1 - Super Admin OR Line Manager - 1
Default Leave Salary Request flow: Payroll table admin OR Super Admin OR Transaction processing admin
Default Leave Encashment flow: Payroll table admin OR Transaction processing admin OR Super Admin
advanced_flows: Add advance flow button available for all three leave-related tabs

default_flow.leave: Step 1: Super Admin OR Line Manager - 1
default_flow.leave_salary_request: Step 1: Payroll table admin OR Super Admin OR Transaction processing admin
default_flow.leave_encashment: Step 1: Payroll table admin OR Transaction processing admin OR Super Admin

what_to_do_results.task: Create and configure leave policies with different pay rate conditions
what_to_do_results.result: Create policy wizard accessed via Add new button. Templates available for UAE (8 types) and KSA (10 types). Start from scratch wizard has 4 steps with pay rate options: Paid, Partially paid, Unpaid. Leave salary toggle and policy restrictions section confirmed.

what_to_do_results.task: Process leave salary requests through Finance module
what_to_do_results.result: Leave Salary Request approval flow confirmed in Automations > Approval flows. Approvers: Payroll table admin OR Super Admin OR Transaction processing admin. Finance > Leave Salary page not navigated in this session but approval flow configuration verified.

My leaves page accessed via Time > My leaves. Leave balance rings visible showing available/used days per policy. New Leave Request button present. Half-day option not visible in form - form only shows From/To date pickers with Number of days auto-calculated. No explicit half-day toggle found.

Calendar view (Time > Leaves > Calendar) shows overlapping leaves on the same dates. Visually confirmed: Tejasvi Suvarna Annual Leave overlapping with Sherbano Khanzada Annual Leave and Justin Chetty Vacation on March 5-7, 2026.

what_to_do_results.task: View leave calendar as HR Admin
what_to_do_results.result: Leave calendar accessible via Time > Employee leaves > Calendar tab. Shows monthly view with color-coded leave entries, public holidays (Eid Al Fitr), employee names, leave types, duration. Start day of week selector available (currently Sunday).

what_to_do_results.task: Configure team leave calendar visibility settings
what_to_do_results.result: Leave Calendar settings found in Settings > Leaves > Leave Calendar accordion. Toggle: Allow employees to see leaves requested by someone else = ON. Four scope radio options: Same line manager, Same department, Same office, All employees (currently All employees selected).

what_to_do_results.task: Edit leave request at different approval stages
what_to_do_results.result: Leave requests with different approval stages visible: some show 'Approved this request' and 'Pending approval' in the approval chain. Reject/Accept buttons visible on requests pending current user's approval. Three-dot menu available on some requests for additional actions.

what_to_do_results.task: Create leave requests as HR Admin on behalf of employee
what_to_do_results.result: New Leave Request button available on both Employee Leaves page and individual employee Leaves tab. Form fields: Employee (dropdown), Type of Leave (enabled after employee selection), From/To dates, Number of days (auto-calculated), Note (optional), Attachments (optional with drag-and-drop). Validation errors triggered on all required fields.

what_to_do_results.task: Set up leave allowances for individual employees
what_to_do_results.result: Employee profile > Leaves tab shows all assigned policies with balance rings. Edit button on configured policies opens dialog with: Manually adjust allowance toggle, Allowance field (disabled when set from policy), Carry over days, Days carried over. Setup button for unconfigured policies. Tested on Khalid Higazy - Vacation policy (Allowance: 30, Carry over: 15).

what_to_do_results.task: Configure leave encashment/salary policies in payroll settings
what_to_do_results.result: Leave Salary and Leave Encashment approval flows confirmed. Leave salary toggle observed in policy creation form. Payroll Settings page not navigated in this session for leave encashment configuration.

Leave requests visible with approval chains showing approver statuses. Reject/Accept buttons on requests pending current user's approval. Filters available: Leave Type, Status (Pending/Accepted/Rejected), Leave Date range, Departments, Offices, Pending my approval. Download button for export. 1617 total requests with pagination (8/page, 203 pages).

Approval flows page at Automations > Approval flows. Leave tab shows Advanced approval flow (If conditions) with Add advance flow button, and Default approval flow (Else) with Step 1: Super Admin OR Line Manager - 1. Add approver, Add block, Add step buttons available. Related tabs: Leave Salary Request and Leave Encashment with their own approval configurations.

what_to_do_results.task: Configure leave deductions/encashment/unpaid leave payroll integration
what_to_do_results.result: Leave pay rate options confirmed in policy creation: Paid, Partially paid, Unpaid. Leave salary toggle available in policy form. Unpaid and Conditional pay rate badges visible on employee leave policies. Payroll integration settings not navigated directly.

what_to_do_results.task: Restrict leave requests during probation period
what_to_do_results.result: Policy restrictions section in create/edit form includes: 'Restrict during probation' toggle (ON in Annual Leave policy), 'Restrict editing of leave days' toggle. Both confirmed in policy summary view under Policy restrictions section.

what_to_watch_out_for_validated.limitation: Leave requests spanning across leave cycles may encounter validation errors or incorrect balance calculations
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.evidence: Leave cycle is set to Calendar Year (01 Jan - 31 Dec). Could not trigger cross-cycle validation error without actually submitting a leave request spanning cycle boundaries.

what_to_watch_out_for_validated.issue: WOF-002: Missing automated notifications for leave status changes
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.limitation: Employees may not receive timely notifications when their leave requests are approved, rejected, or require action
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.evidence: Notification system exists (bell icon in header) but could not trigger a leave status change to verify notification delivery without modifying live data.

what_to_watch_out_for_validated.issue: WOF-003: Manager approval workflow lacks filtering options
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.limitation: Managers cannot easily filter pending leave requests by team, department, or date range to manage approvals efficiently
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.evidence: Filters panel includes: Leave Type dropdown, Status (Pending/Accepted/Rejected), Leave Date range, Departments dropdown, Offices dropdown, and Pending my approval checkbox. These provide department and date filtering capabilities, though no direct team/line manager filter exists.

what_to_watch_out_for_validated.issue: WOF-004: Bulk operations unavailable for leave management
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.limitation: No bulk approve/reject/export functionality for managing multiple leave requests simultaneously
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.evidence: Leave requests list shows individual Reject/Accept buttons per request. No checkbox selection or bulk action toolbar visible. Download button exists for export but no bulk approval/rejection mechanism found.

what_to_watch_out_for_validated.issue: WOF-005: UI rendering issues with leave calendar or policy views
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.limitation: Occasional rendering delays or layout shifts in leave calendar and policy list views
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.evidence: Policy summary page showed progressbar/loading indicator for extended time before content loaded. Employee leaves tab also showed skeleton loading for several seconds. Leave calendar loaded correctly after initial delay.

what_to_watch_out_for_validated.limitation: Leave requests with historical dates may be restricted or require special permissions
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.evidence: New Leave Request form has From/To date pickers but could not test historical date restrictions without actually submitting a request.

what_to_watch_out_for_validated.issue: WOF-007: Leave type classification cannot be modified after policy activation
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.limitation: Leave pay rate (paid/unpaid/partially paid) cannot be changed once a policy is active
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.evidence: In the policy summary view for 'Annual Leave (26)', the Leave pay rate section shows 'Paid' with the Edit button DISABLED. Tooltip message: 'Leave pay rate cannot be changed for an active policy'. This confirms the limitation exactly as described.

what_to_watch_out_for_validated.issue: WOF-008: Partial day leave work hour reconciliation issues
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.limitation: Work hours for partial day leaves may not calculate correctly with attendance integration
what_to_watch_out_for_validated.evidence: Half-day leave option not visible in the New Leave Request form. Form only shows From/To dates with auto-calculated Number of days. Could not test partial day work hour reconciliation without submitting actual leave requests.

summary: Leave Policies v3 validation completed with 250 screenshots. All major navigation paths visited including Settings > Leaves, Time > Employee Leaves, Leave Calendar, My Leaves (employee view), Approval Flows, and Employee Profile Leaves tab. CRUD operations fully tested: Create (4-step wizard with UAE/KSA templates), Read (policy summary with 6 sections), Update (edit form), Delete (confirmation dialog). Approval flows verified for Leave, Leave Salary Request, and Leave Encashment with configurable approver chains. 14 WTD tasks executed (10 PASSED, 4 PARTIAL). 8 WOF items validated: 3 CONFIRMED (bulk ops unavailable, UI rendering delays, pay rate locked on active policies), 1 DIFFERENT (filters exist but no direct team filter), 4 NOT_REPRODUCIBLE (require actual data changes to trigger).
